explanation_sections.content_ar:
● القاعدة
أنتِ عندك زمنين تفرّقين بينهم في تقرير نتائجك:
• الماضي البسيط = حدث خلص في وقت محدّد ومعروف. لو فيه إشارة وقت زي (last week, on the first of April, in April) استخدمي الماضي البسيط: launched, ran, spent.
• المضارع التام = النتيجة مهمة الحين، أو الوقت لسّه مفتوح. لو شفتِ (already, yet, so far, since, this year) اطلعي على المضارع التام: have + التصريف الثالث، زي have gained و have grown.
لاحظي القاعدة: وقت محدّد ← ماضٍ بسيط، وأثر مستمر أو وقت مفتوح ← مضارع تام. جرّبي تسألين نفسك «هل الوقت خلص ولا لسّه؟» وبتعرفين وش تختارين.
explanation_sections.content_en:
Past Simple vs Present Perfect

• Past simple = a finished action at a known past time. Time markers: last week, on the first of April, in April.
Example: We launched the campaign on the first of April.

• Present perfect = the result matters now, or the time is still open. Markers: already, yet, so far, since, this year.
Example: We have gained 24,000 new followers.

Rule of thumb: a specific finished time gives past simple; an open or ongoing time gives present perfect.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● من مشهدك
هذي جمل من تقريرك أنتِ:
• «We launched it on the first of April.» — تاريخ محدّد، فالفعل ماضٍ بسيط.
• «We have gained 24,000 new followers.» — رقم توّه يكبر، فالفعل مضارع تام.
• «Sales have grown by 31% since the campaign started.» — كلمة since تبيّن إن الأثر مستمر من وقت الإطلاق لين الحين.
لاحظي كيف نفس التقرير يجمع الزمنين: اللي خلص بوقته، واللي نتيجته لسّه تكبر معنا.
explanation_sections.content_en:
From your report

• We launched it on the first of April. — a fixed date, so past simple.
• We have gained 24,000 new followers. — a number still growing, so present perfect.
• Sales have grown by 31% since the campaign started. — since shows the result continues up to now.

One report, both tenses: what finished on its date, and what is still growing.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● أخطاء شائعة
✗ We have launched the campaign last week. ✓ We launched the campaign last week. — مع وقت محدّد (last week) لازم ماضٍ بسيط، مو مضارع تام.
✗ We didn't finish the analysis yet. ✓ We haven't finished the analysis yet. — كلمة yet تنادي المضارع التام.
✗ Since April, sales grew by 31%. ✓ Since April, sales have grown by 31%. — since معناها الأثر ماشي لين الحين، فالمضارع التام.
explanation_sections.content_en:
Common mistakes

✗ We have launched the campaign last week.
✓ We launched the campaign last week. — a specific past time (last week) needs past simple.

✗ We didn't finish the analysis yet.
✓ We haven't finished the analysis yet. — yet takes present perfect.

✗ Since April, sales grew by 31%.
✓ Since April, sales have grown by 31%. — since means the effect continues, so present perfect.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● متى تستخدمينها
في اجتماع النتائج، رتّبيها كذا:
• للأحداث اللي سوّيتيها وخلّصتيها: ماضٍ بسيط — «We launched…, we ran…, we spent…».
• للأرقام اللي لسّه تكبر أو النتيجة الحاضرة: مضارع تام — «We have reached…, sales have grown…, the client has approved…».
الفكرة إن الماضي البسيط يسرد القصة، والمضارع التام يوصّل قيمتك الحين. لو بدأتِ جملتك بـ so far أو since أو this year، اطلعي على المضارع التام على طول.
explanation_sections.content_en:
When to use each

In the results meeting, order it like this:
• For actions you did and finished: past simple — We launched…, we ran…, we spent…
• For numbers still growing or the present result: present perfect — We have reached…, sales have grown…, the client has approved…

Past simple tells the story; present perfect delivers your value now. If your sentence starts with so far, since, or this year, reach for the present perfect.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the past simple or the present perfect.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في الماضي البسيط أو المضارع التام

item.question: In total, we ______ (spend) 55,000 riyals last month, slightly under budget.
item.correct_answer: spent
item.explanation_ar: وقت محدّد (last month) ← ماضٍ بسيط.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the past simple or the present perfect.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في الماضي البسيط أو المضارع التام

item.question: Since the campaign ended, three influencers ______ (contact) us to work again.
item.correct_answer: have contacted
item.explanation_ar: since ونتيجة مستمرة ← مضارع تام.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the past simple or the present perfect.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في الماضي البسيط أو المضارع التام

item.question: We ______ (not finish) the final analysis yet, but the early numbers are strong.
item.correct_answer: have not finished
item.explanation_ar: كلمة yet تنادي المضارع التام.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: During those six weeks, the campaign ______ 2.3 million people.
item.correct_answer: reached
item.explanation_ar: فترة خلصت ومحدّدة (those six weeks) ← ماضٍ بسيط.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: Compared to last quarter, sales ______ by 31% so far.
item.correct_answer: have grown
item.explanation_ar: so far ونتيجة مستمرة + sales جمع ← have grown.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite the sentence in the present perfect.

item.question: Rewrite in the present perfect: The campaign gained us 24,000 new followers.
item.correct_answer: The campaign has gained us 24,000 new followers.
item.explanation_ar: نتيجة توّها حاضرة ← has + التصريف الثالث.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite in the past simple, adding the time marker in brackets.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى الماضي البسيط مع إضافة إشارة الوقت

item.question: Rewrite in the past simple: We have spent the whole budget. (last month)
item.correct_answer: We spent the whole budget last month.
item.explanation_ar: وقت محدّد (last month) يفرض الماضي البسيط ويشيل have.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Last week, the client has approved a second phase.'
item.correct_answer: Last week, the client approved a second phase.
item.explanation_ar: مع last week نستخدم الماضي البسيط، مو المضارع التام.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'We didn't finish the results report yet.'
item.correct_answer: We haven't finished the results report yet.
item.explanation_ar: كلمة yet تبي المضارع التام (haven't finished).

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: been / this / The / our / performance / campaign / has / best / year
item.correct_answer: The campaign has been our best performance this year.
item.explanation_ar: this year وقت لسّه مفتوح ← مضارع تام (has been).

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● القاعدة
عندك نوعين من الشرط تستخدمينهم في التفاوض:
• الشرط الأول (واقعي ووارد): if + مضارع بسيط ← will / can. مثال: «If you post three reels, we WILL PAY 8,000.» تستخدمينه للعروض اللي أنتِ جاهزة تلتزمين فيها.
• الشرط الثاني (افتراضي وألطف): if + ماضٍ بسيط ← would / could. مثال: «If you increased the fee, I WOULD INCLUDE an extra reel.» تستخدمينه عشان تطرحين احتمال بلطف بدون التزام.
لاحظي: بعد if ما نحطّ will أبداً، والشرط الثاني ما يعني ماضي حقيقي — هو بس طريقة مؤدّبة تطرحين فيها فكرة.
explanation_sections.content_en:
First & Second Conditionals

• First conditional (real / likely): if + present simple → will / can.
If you post three reels, we will pay 8,000. — for firm offers you are ready to commit to.

• Second conditional (hypothetical / softer): if + past simple → would / could.
If you increased the fee, I would include an extra reel. — to float an idea politely with no commitment.

Never put will after if. The second conditional is not real past — it is just a polite way to suggest something.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● من مشهدك
هذي من مراسلتك مع المؤثرة:
• «If you post three reels and two stories, we will pay 8,000 riyals.» — عرض أكيد، فالشرط الأول.
• «If you increased the fee to 10,000, I would include an extra reel.» — احتمال تطرحينه بلطف، فالشرط الثاني.
• «If the reels get strong engagement, we will extend the collaboration.» — شرط أول يفتح باب لمرحلة جاية.
لاحظي كيف الأول يثبّت العرض، والثاني يفاوض بمرونة.
explanation_sections.content_en:
From your scene

From your influencer thread:
• If you post three reels and two stories, we will pay 8,000 riyals. — a firm offer, so first conditional.
• If you increased the fee to 10,000, I would include an extra reel. — a polite possibility, so second conditional.
• If the reels get strong engagement, we will extend the collaboration. — a first conditional that opens the next stage.

The first locks the offer; the second negotiates with flexibility.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● أخطاء شائعة
✗ If you will post three reels, we will pay 8,000. ✓ If you post three reels, we will pay 8,000. — بعد if نحطّ مضارع بسيط، مو will.
✗ If you increased the fee, I will include an extra reel. ✓ If you increased the fee, I would include an extra reel. — if + ماضٍ يبي would، مو will.
✗ If you would give me more freedom, the content would feel natural. ✓ If you gave me more freedom, the content would feel natural. — would ما تجي داخل جملة if.
explanation_sections.content_en:
Common mistakes

✗ If you will post three reels, we will pay 8,000.
✓ If you post three reels, we will pay 8,000. — use present simple after if, not will.

✗ If you increased the fee, I will include an extra reel.
✓ If you increased the fee, I would include an extra reel. — if + past needs would, not will.

✗ If you would give me more freedom, the content would feel natural.
✓ If you gave me more freedom, the content would feel natural. — would never goes inside the if-clause.

explanation_sections.content_ar:
● متى تستخدمينها
في التفاوض، اختاري حسب هدفك:
• الشرط الأول للعروض اللي أنتِ ملتزمة فيها: «If you accept today, we will send the brief tomorrow.» يعطي إحساس بالثقة والجدية.
• الشرط الثاني عشان تطرحين احتمال بلطف أو تردّين على طلب بدون ما تلتزمين: «If you gave us a longer deadline, we could add a bonus.» يخلّي الباب مفتوح للنقاش.
خليكِ ودودة وواضحة — الأول يبني الصفقة، والثاني يبقي العلاقة مرنة.
explanation_sections.content_en:
When to use each

In a negotiation, choose by your goal:
• First conditional for offers you commit to: If you accept today, we will send the brief tomorrow. — it sounds confident and serious.
• Second conditional to float a possibility or answer a request without committing: If you gave us a longer deadline, we could add a bonus. — it keeps the door open.

Stay warm and clear — the first builds the deal, the second keeps the relationship flexible.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the correct conditional form.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

item.question: If you accept the offer today, we ______ (send) you the brief tomorrow.
item.correct_answer: will send
item.explanation_ar: شرط أول واقعي: if + مضارع ← will.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the correct conditional form.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

item.question: If you gave me more creative freedom, the content ______ (feel) more natural to my audience.
item.correct_answer: would feel
item.explanation_ar: شرط ثاني افتراضي: if + ماضٍ ← would.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the correct conditional form.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

item.question: If the reels ______ (get) strong engagement, we can extend the collaboration into autumn.
item.correct_answer: get
item.explanation_ar: جملة if في الشرط الأول تاخذ مضارع بسيط ← get.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في صيغة الشرط الصحيحة

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: If you increased the fee to 10,000, I ______ an extra reel for free.
item.correct_answer: would include
item.explanation_ar: شرط ثاني: if + ماضٍ (increased) ← would + مصدر.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: If we ______ on these terms today, I could start filming next week.
item.correct_answer: agreed
item.explanation_ar: مع could في الجواب، جملة if تاخذ ماضٍ بسيط ← agreed (شرط ثاني).

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite as a second conditional to make the offer softer.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى الشرط الثاني لتلطيف العرض

item.question: Rewrite as a second conditional: If you post three reels, we will pay 8,000.
item.correct_answer: If you posted three reels, we would pay 8,000.
item.explanation_ar: الشرط الثاني: if + ماضٍ (posted) ← would pay.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite as a first conditional (a firm, real offer).
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى الشرط الأول (عرض مؤكد)

item.question: Rewrite as a first conditional: If you accepted today, we would send the brief tomorrow.
item.correct_answer: If you accept today, we will send the brief tomorrow.
item.explanation_ar: الشرط الأول: if + مضارع (accept) ← will send.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'If you will post three reels, we will pay 8,000 riyals.'
item.correct_answer: If you post three reels, we will pay 8,000 riyals.
item.explanation_ar: بعد if نحطّ مضارع بسيط، ما نحطّ will.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'If you increased the fee, I will include an extra reel.'
item.correct_answer: If you increased the fee, I would include an extra reel.
item.explanation_ar: if + ماضٍ (increased) يبي would، مو will.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: will / If / week / this / agree / a / we / add / you / bonus
item.correct_answer: If you agree this week we will add a bonus.
item.explanation_ar: شرط أول: if + مضارع (agree) ← will add.
